description: Interactive business idea validator using the Minimalist Entrepreneur framework — 10 phases from community to review, with scoring and shareable results
features: 10-phase validation framework (Community, Problem, MVP, Processize, First 100 Customers, Pricing, Marketing, Growth, Culture, Review)
Client-side analysis engine with keyword matching and idea type detection
Animated circular score gauge (0→100 count-up with color gradient red/yellow/green)
Confetti celebration effect for scores above 75
Shareable results via URL hash encoding
Phase navigation stepper with keyboard arrow key support
Staggered card animations with Intersection Observer
Dark theme with per-phase colored borders
Responsive 2-column grid on desktop, single column on mobile
